subtitle_it: Evento stagionale con spore di ricombinazione, obiettivi giornalieri e milestone DNA.
subtitle_en: Seasonal event with recombination spores, daily objectives and DNA milestones.

progress_rules.summary_it: Accumuli Spore Evento eliminando nemici durante la partita: base +1, elite +4, boss +10. Il Settore Difesa applica poi il suo moltiplicatore.
progress_rules.summary_en: You earn Event Spores by defeating enemies during a match: base +1, elite +4, boss +10. The Defense Sector then applies its multiplier.
progress_rules.note_it: Le Operazioni Attive qui sotto sono obiettivi veri: avanzano in tempo reale e rilasciano DNA quando li riscatti.
progress_rules.note_en: The Active Operations below are real objectives: they advance live and award DNA when you claim them.

objective_templates.description_it: Elimina nemici base per alimentare il tracciato evento.
objective_templates.description_en: Defeat basic enemies to feed the event track.

objective_templates.description_it: Conta ogni abbattimento: ideale per build ad area e multicolpo.
objective_templates.description_en: Every takedown counts: ideal for area and multishot builds.

objective_templates.description_it: Concentrati sugli elite: valgono piu Spore e accelerano la progressione.
objective_templates.description_en: Focus elites: they yield more Spores and accelerate progression.

objective_templates.description_it: Chiudi una wave boss per ottenere il claim piu pesante della rotazione.
objective_templates.description_en: Close a boss wave to secure the heaviest claim in the rotation.

objective_templates.description_it: Raggiungi una wave piu alta nella sessione corrente.
objective_templates.description_en: Reach a higher wave in the current session.

objective_templates.description_it: Compra upgrade Attacco in partita per accelerare la build.
objective_templates.description_en: Buy Attack upgrades during the run to accelerate the build.

objective_templates.description_it: Compra upgrade Difesa per stabilizzare il nucleo.
objective_templates.description_en: Buy Defense upgrades to stabilize the core.

objective_templates.description_it: Compra upgrade Utility per far crescere economia e raccolta.
objective_templates.description_en: Buy Utility upgrades to grow economy and collection.

objective_templates.description_it: Seleziona mutazioni runtime e sfrutta le finestre di adattamento.
objective_templates.description_en: Select runtime mutations and exploit adaptation windows.

objective_templates.description_it: Dai priorita ai virus per chiudere il claim in fretta.
objective_templates.description_en: Prioritize viruses to close the claim quickly.

objective_templates.description_it: Concentrati sui batteri per liberare le corsie pesanti.
objective_templates.description_en: Focus bacteria to clear the heavy lanes.

objective_templates.description_it: Ogni upgrade runtime conta: resta aggressivo nel negozio in partita.
objective_templates.description_en: Every runtime upgrade counts: stay active in the in-run shop.
